title: LG · Refrigerator
next_step: Pro service required - escalation email + inspection video guide ready to send.

escalation.drafted_email:
Hello LG Customer Support,

I need to schedule a service visit for my LG refrigerator (model LFXS26973S). The compressor clicks repeatedly and the unit is not cooling. I have already tried: vacuuming the condenser coils, checking the start relay, and confirming no cooling after 3 hours. Please dispatch a technician.

Thank you.

inspection_guide.narration: Read out the model number on the plate.
Show the temperature display so the tech can read the error.
Capture the clicking sound near the compressor.
Say what is wrong and what you already tried.

packet.summary: LG refrigerator not cooling; compressor clicks. 3 steps tried, no resolution.
